title: El hijo del cura
overview: In a village of Spanish Levante, lives Justo, the priest. It is well-liked by all his neighbors by way of helping others. Agapito, the Communist mayor, has a daughter, who got pregnant with her ​​boyfriend and thinking that her father can kill her boyfriend, says that the child she is expecting is of the priest . Justo, beset by Agapito, and all the neighbours, decide to hang habits, but at the last minute and assisted by village girls get the truth to come to light...
